name: segmentation-marginalized morphology (word boundaries latent; affixes induced by marginalizing over a calibrated boundary distribution)
primary_verdict_basis: PC-LB (LB TEST opaque streams, 30% split): the frozen inventory rule R (p<=0.01, n_null=200) yields an EMPTY gold target (best gold candidate JO|SUF p=0.0149) -> recovery test VACUOUS -> MACHINERY_UNINFORMATIVE. Under the D1 posthoc relaxation (p<=0.05) the target is populated (3 gold) but the FROZEN arm's wrong-structure control does not collapse (real frozen F1 0.0 <= wrong-structure frozen F1 0.105), so machinery_informative stays False at the preregistered gate. Per the frozen rule, NO LA interpretation is licensed from PC-LB; LA numbers are reported below but not claimed as gate-validated.

machinery_informativeness.note: PC-LB is uninformative because the 30%-TEST gold target is under-powered (empty at p<=0.01), NOT because the machinery is dead: the synthetic control (populated target, truth fully known) demonstrates the machinery works and that marginalization improves decisively under hapax load; the posthoc well-powered Gfull LB target (all 11,908 words) independently shows marginalization recovers where frozen fails.

synthetic_control.reading: frozen-single-segmentation morphology COLLAPSES as the stem inventory grows hapax-heavy (F1 0.690->0.438->0.133 at N_stem 150->600->2400) while marginalized morphology holds (0.898/0.860/0.823); delta +0.209/+0.422/+0.690, all 5/5 seeds non-negative at every regime -> GRACEFUL confirmed.

pc_lb_gfull_posthoc_characterization.reading: on a well-powered LB gold target (A3|PRE, JO|SUF), marginalization recovers 2/2 (F1 0.80) where the frozen segmentation recovers 0/2 (F1 0.00); marg wrong-structure control collapses to 0.0 -> consistent with MARGINALIZATION_IMPROVES, but posthoc and therefore not the primary verdict.

a_prefix_confirmatory.reading: A- prefixation (the one relphono-validated LA affix) REPLICATES under GORILA words (obs 47, p 0.0005) and is ROBUST under segmentation-marginalization (marg p 0.0005 <= 0.05); marginalization IMPROVES detection (marg p 0.0005 <= frozen p 0.002). Reported per prereg; not licensed as gate-validated because PC-LB was vacuous.

exploratory_scan.reading: 0/71 candidates survive Holm at alpha 0.05 (best raw TI|SUF p 0.0145 -> Holm 1.0). No NEW LA affix candidate emerges under marginalization; A- remains the sole validated LA affix.

controls.positive_control: PC-LB run FIRST; outcome MACHINERY_UNINFORMATIVE (target vacuous at prereg bar) — see basis.
controls.wrong_structure_null: run in every PC-LB scoring pass (prereg/D1/Gfull); collapses for marg on populated targets, not for frozen.
controls.synthetic_graceful_control: GRACEFUL (5/5 seeds nonneg at every regime; decisive at N_stem=2400).

deviations: D1 (posthoc p<=0.05 characterization + Gfull target; POSTHOC, never the verdict)
D2 (SUPERSEDING stream-level marginalized null, replacing the anti-conservative fresh-per-sample null; applied uniformly before any LA run)
key_findings: PRIMARY (frozen gate): PC-LB is MACHINERY_UNINFORMATIVE — the p<=0.01 inventory rule yields an EMPTY LB-TEST gold target at the 30% split, so the marginalize-vs-frozen recovery comparison cannot be adjudicated at the preregistered bar; per the frozen rule no LA interpretation is licensed from it.

SYNTHETIC control (truth known, populated target) is DECISIVE the other way: frozen-single-segmentation morphology collapses as the corpus turns hapax-heavy (F1 0.69->0.44->0.13) while marginalized morphology holds (0.90/0.86/0.82); delta +0.21/+0.42/+0.69, 5/5 seeds non-negative at every regime -> GRACEFUL. The uninformative PC-LB is an under-powered-target artifact of the small LB TEST split, not a dead detector.

Posthoc well-powered LB target (all 11,908 words, Gfull) independently corroborates: marginalization recovers 2/2 gold affixes (A3|PRE,JO|SUF) at F1 0.80 where the frozen segmentation recovers 0/2 (F1 0.0), and the marg wrong-structure control collapses to 0 — consistent with MARGINALIZATION_IMPROVES (posthoc, not the primary verdict).

LA A- prefixation (reported, not gate-licensed): REPLICATES on GORILA words (obs 47, p 0.0005) and is ROBUST under segmentation-marginalization (marg p 0.0005); marginalization IMPROVES its detection over the frozen segmentation (0.0005 vs 0.002). The one validated LA affix survives integrating boundary uncertainty.

LA exploratory scan: 0/71 candidates survive Holm at alpha 0.05 (best raw TI|SUF p 0.0145). No NEW LA affix candidate under marginalization; A- remains the sole validated LA affix — consistent with the whole campaign's morphology finding.

SUPERSEDING null (D2): the preregistered fresh-synthetic-per-sample marginalized null was mechanically anti-conservative (shrinks null variance ~1/K while the K segmentation samples share one real stream); replaced append-only by a stream-level null that preserves cross-sample correlation and reduces exactly to the E1 word-level null for a single segmentation.

Non-circular throughout: boundary model inputs are unsupervised distributional cues + physical LA layout marks; LB gold enters only as calibration/grading; sign names are anonymous GORILA/DAMOS identities; no phonetic value is an input; claim ceiling L2/L3, no transfer licence touched.
successor_hypotheses: H1: The LB-TEST target vacuity is a split-size artifact — re-run PC-LB with a 50/50 or LOO-tablet split (or a hierarchical partial-pooling inventory rule) so the gold target is populated at p<=0.01, then re-adjudicate marginalize-vs-frozen at the PREREGISTERED bar (would license or refute the IMPROVES direction the synthetic + Gfull characterizations point to).

H2: Boundary-boundary interaction (assumption A4 relaxed): replace independent-Bernoulli gap sampling with a first-order CRF / semi-Markov boundary model calibrated on LB; measure whether modelling adjacency raises marginalized affix-recovery on the synthetic hapax-heavy regime beyond the independent sampler.

H3: Marginalize over the SEGMENTATION MODEL too (not just samples from one calibrated map): ensemble B3 families (branching-entropy / TP / Bayesian / MDL) with per-family weights, and propagate model uncertainty into the affix null — does A-'s IMPROVES margin widen or vanish?

H4: A- direction test as a held-out prospective seal: freeze the marginalized A- productivity + null on the current silver corpus; when Anetaki II (or any new LA editio princeps) lands, test whether the A- prefix rate on the NEW documents matches the frozen prediction (out-of-sample morphology, not in-sample).

H5: Combine the marginalized boundary posterior with E013's component-decomposition channel — do affixes defined over sign COMPONENTS (rather than whole signs) survive marginalization + Holm where whole-sign affixes (this scan) do not?

H6: Port the marginalized inventory machinery to Cypriot (a second readable syllabary at LA-like scale) as a second positive control with a NON-vacuous target, to establish whether MARGINALIZATION_IMPROVES generalizes across readable scripts before any LA licence is claimed.
